steps.title: Weaken the no-link claim
steps.content: The student claims that review emotionality is unrelated to box office success. To weaken that conclusion, a finding must show a direct relationship between emotionality scores in written reviews and box office earnings.

steps.title: Reject star-rating evidence
steps.content: Choice A connects emotionality to star ratings, not earnings. Choice C reports many average star ratings, with no emotionality or earnings link. Choice D connects star ratings to box office success, but the student's conclusion is specifically about emotionality in written reviews. The answer is B.
